name: url

outputs.description: URLs related to the scanned URL URLScan.RelatedIPs IPs related to the URL scanned
outputs.name: URLScan.URLs

outputs.description: ASNs related to the scanned URL URLScan.Countries Countries associated with the scanned URL
outputs.name: URLScan.RelatedASNs

outputs.description: IOCs found for the scanned URL URLScan.Subdomains Associated sub-domains for the scanned URL
outputs.name: URLScan.relatedhashes

outputs.description: ASN of the scanned URL URLScan.Data URL of the file found
outputs.name: URLScan.ASN

outputs.description: Vendor reporting the malicious indicator for the file URLScan.Malicious.Description Description of the malicious indicator
outputs.name: URLScan.Malicious.Vendor

outputs.description: SHA-256 of file found URLScan.File.FileName File name of file found
outputs.name: URLScan.File.Hash

outputs.description: File type of the file found URLScan.File.Hostname URL where the file was found
outputs.name: URLScan.File.FileType

outputs.description: Certificates found for the scanned URL URLScan.RedirectedURLS Redirected URLs from the URL scanned
outputs.name: URLScan.Certificates

outputs.description: Effective URL of the original URL URL.ASN The URL ASN.
outputs.name: URLScan.EffectiveURL

outputs.description: Indicators that are associated with the URL. URL.FeedRelatedIndicators.type The type of the indicators that are associated with the URL.
outputs.name: URL.FeedRelatedIndicators.value

outputs.description: The URL country. URL.ASOwner The URL AS owner.
outputs.name: URL.Geo.Country

outputs.description: Tags that are associated with the URL.
outputs.name: URL.Tags
